testcase.name: StorageError > should create an error with correct name and message
StorageError > should have a stack trace
FileTooLargeError > should create an error with correct properties
FileTooLargeError > should format message with different sizes
InvalidContentTypeError > should create an error with correct properties
InvalidContentTypeError > should format message with single allowed type
InvalidContentTypeError > should format message with multiple allowed types
ObjectNotFoundError > should create an error with default message when key is not provided
ObjectNotFoundError > should create an error with key in message when provided
HeadObjectFailedError > should create an error with default message when key is not provided
HeadObjectFailedError > should create an error with key in message when provided
InvalidStorageKeyError > should create an error with key in message
InvalidStorageKeyError > should include reason in message when provided
generateKey > upload keys > should generate a valid upload key with UUID
generateKey > upload keys > should handle filenames with extensions
generateKey > upload keys > should handle filenames without extensions
generateKey > upload keys > should handle nested paths in filename
generateKey > snapshot keys > should generate a valid snapshot key
generateKey > snapshot keys > should handle filenames with extensions
generateKey > snapshot keys > should handle filenames without extensions
generateKey > snapshot keys > should handle nested paths in filename
detectKeyType > should detect upload keys
detectKeyType > should detect snapshot keys
detectKeyType > should return null for unrecognized keys
parseStorageKey > upload keys > should parse a valid upload key correctly
parseStorageKey > upload keys > should handle nested paths after UUID
parseStorageKey > upload keys > should handle filenames with multiple dots
parseStorageKey > upload keys > should throw InvalidStorageKeyError if UUID segment is missing
parseStorageKey > snapshot keys > should parse a valid snapshot key correctly
parseStorageKey > snapshot keys > should handle nested paths in snapshot keys
parseStorageKey > snapshot keys > should throw InvalidStorageKeyError if snapshotId segment is missing
parseStorageKey > error handling > should throw InvalidStorageKeyError for unrecognized key patterns
parseStorageKey > error handling > should throw InvalidStorageKeyError if key has insufficient segments
parseStorageKey > error handling > should throw InvalidStorageKeyError if filename has no extension
parseStorageKey > error handling > should preserve the invalid key in the error
Storage > presignPut > should generate a presigned upload URL
Storage > presignPut > should throw InvalidContentTypeError for disallowed content type
Storage > presignPut > should use filename as-is in the generated key
Storage > verify > should verify a valid upload and return metadata
Storage > verify > should throw FileTooLargeError if file exceeds max size
Storage > verify > should throw InvalidContentTypeError for disallowed content type
Storage > verify > should throw ObjectNotFoundError if object does not exist
Storage > verify > should throw HeadObjectFailedError for other S3 errors
Storage > verify > should use default content type if not provided by S3
Storage > presignGet > should generate a presigned download URL with metadata
Storage > presignGet > should throw ObjectNotFoundError if object does not exist
Storage > getObject > should read an object and return Buffer
Storage > getObject > should throw ObjectNotFoundError if object does not exist
Storage > getObject > should throw ObjectNotFoundError for 404 status code
Storage > getObject > should propagate other errors
Storage > putObject > should write a Buffer to S3
Storage > putObject > should write a string to S3
Storage > putObject > should write without content type when not provided
Storage > putObject > should throw InvalidContentTypeError for disallowed content type
Storage > putObject > should write Uint8Array to S3
Storage > deleteObject > should delete a single object
Storage > deleteObject > should be idempotent (no error if object does not exist)
Storage > listObjectsByPrefix > should list all objects under a prefix
Storage > listObjectsByPrefix > should handle pagination when results are truncated
Storage > listObjectsByPrefix > should return empty array when no objects match prefix
Storage > listObjectsByPrefix > should handle missing Contents in response
Storage > deleteObjects > should delete multiple objects in a single batch
Storage > deleteObjects > should handle partial failures
Storage > deleteObjects > should return empty result for empty keys array
Storage > deleteObjects > should batch delete requests for more than 1000 keys
Storage > deleteObjects > should handle batch failure and mark all keys as errors
Storage > configuration > should accept S3Client via constructor
Storage > configuration > should use injected S3Client instance
Connection > connect > should successfully connect to MongoDB
Connection > connect > should throw an error if connection fails
Connection > connect > should handle non-Error exceptions
Connection > disconnect > should successfully disconnect from MongoDB
Connection > disconnect > should throw an error if disconnection fails
Connection > disconnect > should handle non-Error exceptions during disconnect
AlgorithmPreset model > AlgorithmPreset validation > should correctly validate a valid algorithm preset
AlgorithmPreset model > AlgorithmPreset pagination > should have paginate method
AlgorithmPreset model > AlgorithmPreset pagination > should paginate with custom page and limit
AlgorithmPreset model > AlgorithmPreset pagination > should handle string page and limit parameters
AlgorithmPreset model > AlgorithmPreset pagination > should sort by field ascending
AlgorithmPreset model > AlgorithmPreset pagination > should sort by field descending
AlgorithmPreset model > AlgorithmPreset pagination > should handle multiple sort criteria
AlgorithmPreset model > AlgorithmPreset pagination > should handle filter queries
Snapshot model > Snapshot validation > should correctly validate a valid snapshot
Snapshot model > Snapshot pagination > should have paginate method
Snapshot model > Snapshot pagination > should paginate with custom page and limit
Snapshot model > Snapshot pagination > should filter by status
Snapshot model > Snapshot pagination > should filter by algorithmPresetFrozen.key
Snapshot model > Snapshot pagination > should filter by algorithmPresetFrozen.version
Snapshot model > Snapshot pagination > should sort by status ascending
Snapshot model > Snapshot pagination > should sort by createdAt descending
Snapshot model > Snapshot pagination > should handle multiple sort criteria
getAlgorithmTaskQueueFromRuntime > returns typescript queue when runtime is typescript
getAlgorithmTaskQueueFromRuntime > returns python queue when runtime is python
getAlgorithmTaskQueueFromRuntime > throws when python runtime has no python queue
getAlgorithmTaskQueueFromRuntime > throws for unsupported runtime
OrchestratorWorkflow task queue routing > routes dependency resolution to the orchestrator task queue and algorithm execution to the algorithm task queue
Algorithm Library Activities > getAlgorithmDefinition > should load algorithm definition successfully
Algorithm Library Activities > getAlgorithmDefinition > should throw error if algorithm not found
contribution-score benchmark > buildCommentBenchmarkRecord > builds a JSON-serializable record with rounded scores
contribution-score benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > includes metadata with included/excluded ids, config, and metrics
contribution-score benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > excludes users not in userIdsInResult
Database Activities > getSnapshot > should fetch a snapshot successfully and include _id as string
Database Activities > getSnapshot > should throw error if snapshot not found
Database Activities > updateSnapshot > should update snapshot status successfully
Database Activities > updateSnapshot > should set error.timestamp when updating with error
dispatchAlgorithm activity > throws UnsupportedAlgorithmError for unknown algorithm keys
proposal-engagement benchmark > buildProposalBenchmarkRecord > builds a JSON-serializable record from pipeline outputs
proposal-engagement benchmark > buildProposalBenchmarkRecord > captures skip_reason for skipped proposals
proposal-engagement benchmark > buildProposalBenchmarkRecord > captures unsupported_round skip_reason for early-round proposals
proposal-engagement benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > includes metadata with included/excluded ids, config, and metrics
proposal-engagement benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > excludes users not in userIdsInResult from benchmark output
proposal-engagement benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > populates per-user accumulator sums and proposal count
proposal-engagement benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > tracks proposals_skipped_unsupported_round in metrics
voting-engagement benchmark > buildVoterBenchmarkRecord > builds a record with correct vote distribution
voting-engagement benchmark > buildVoterBenchmarkRecord > computes raw Shannon entropy and rounds it
voting-engagement benchmark > buildVoterBenchmarkRecord > returns zero entropy for a single-category voter
voting-engagement benchmark > buildVoterBenchmarkRecord > handles empty votes array
voting-engagement benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > includes metadata with processing stats
voting-engagement benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > sorts voters by collection_id
voting-engagement benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > handles empty records array
voting-engagement benchmark > formatBenchmarkOutput > does not mutate the original records array
AlgorithmPresetController > create > should delegate to service.create with the provided DTO
AlgorithmPresetController > create > should pass optional fields from DTO to service
AlgorithmPresetController > list > should delegate to service.list with the provided query DTO
AlgorithmPresetController > list > should handle empty query parameters
AlgorithmPresetController > getById > should delegate to service.getById with the provided id
AlgorithmPresetController > updateById > should delegate to service.updateById with id and update DTO
AlgorithmPresetController > deleteById > should delegate to service.deleteById with the provided id
AlgorithmPresetRepository > create > should call model.create with the provided DTO
AlgorithmPresetRepository > create > should handle create errors
AlgorithmPresetRepository > findAll > should call model.paginate with filter and options
AlgorithmPresetRepository > findAll > should handle empty filter and default pagination options
AlgorithmPresetRepository > findById > should call model.findById with id and return lean result
AlgorithmPresetRepository > findById > should return null when preset not found
AlgorithmPresetRepository > updateById > should call model.findByIdAndUpdate with id and updateDto
AlgorithmPresetRepository > updateById > should return null when preset not found
AlgorithmPresetRepository > deleteById > should call model.findByIdAndDelete with id and session option
AlgorithmPresetRepository > deleteById > should pass session when provided
AlgorithmPresetRepository > deleteById > should return null when preset not found
AlgorithmPresetService > create > should delegate to repository.create with the provided DTO
AlgorithmPresetService > create > should validate storage metadata and CSV content for csv inputs
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - metadata validation > should throw CSVValidationException when content type is not allowed
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - metadata validation > should throw CSVValidationException when file exceeds API config maxSizeBytes
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - metadata validation > should throw CSVValidationException when file exceeds algorithm definition maxBytes
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - metadata validation > should allow files within both API and algorithm definition limits
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - CSV content validation > should throw CSVValidationException when CSV content is invalid
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - CSV content validation > should collect multiple CSV validation errors
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - multiple errors collection > should collect metadata and CSV content errors together
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - multiple errors collection > should collect errors from multiple CSV inputs
AlgorithmPresetService > validateStorageInputs - skip non-CSV inputs > should skip validation for non-csv input types
AlgorithmPresetService > list > should filter by key and version from queryDto
AlgorithmPresetService > list > should filter with pagination options including sortBy
AlgorithmPresetService > list > should handle empty queryDto with no filters
AlgorithmPresetService > getById > should return preset when found
AlgorithmPresetService > getById > should throw NotFoundException when preset not found
AlgorithmPresetService > updateById > should return updated preset when found
AlgorithmPresetService > updateById > should throw NotFoundException when preset not found
AlgorithmPresetService > deleteById > should complete successfully when preset is deleted
AlgorithmPresetService > deleteById > should throw NotFoundException when preset not found
AlgorithmPresetService > deleteById > should cascade delete snapshots, terminate workflows, and clean S3
AlgorithmPresetService > deleteById > should handle S3 cleanup failures gracefully
AlgorithmPresetService > deleteById > should handle partial S3 deletion failures
StorageController > upload > should delegate to service.presignPut with the provided DTO
StorageController > upload > should handle text/plain content type
StorageController > verifyUpload > should delegate to service.verifyUpload with the provided DTO
StorageController > verifyUpload > should handle different file keys
StorageController > signDownload > should delegate to service.presignGet with the provided DTO
StorageController > signDownload > should handle different file keys
StorageService > presignPut > should generate presigned upload URL with valid content type
StorageService > presignPut > should generate presigned upload URL for text/plain
StorageService > presignPut > should use filename as-is in key
StorageService > presignPut > should throw InvalidContentTypeException for disallowed content type
StorageService > presignPut > should throw InvalidContentTypeException for empty content type
StorageService > verifyUpload > should return metadata when object exists and is valid
StorageService > verifyUpload > should handle text/plain content type
StorageService > verifyUpload > should throw ObjectNotFoundException when object does not exist (404)
StorageService > verifyUpload > should throw ObjectNotFoundException when error name is NotFound
StorageService > verifyUpload > should throw FileTooLargeException when file exceeds maxSizeBytes
StorageService > verifyUpload > should throw InvalidContentTypeException when content type not allowed
StorageService > verifyUpload > should throw HeadObjectFailedException on other S3 errors
StorageService > verifyUpload > should default to 0 size when ContentLength is undefined
StorageService > verifyUpload > should default to application/octet-stream when ContentType is undefined
StorageService > presignGet > should generate presigned download URL when object exists
StorageService > presignGet > should verify object exists before generating download URL
StorageService > presignGet > should throw ObjectNotFoundException when object does not exist (404)
StorageService > presignGet > should throw ObjectNotFoundException when error name is NotFound
StorageService > presignGet > should throw HeadObjectFailedException on other S3 errors
StorageService > presignGet > should throw HeadObjectFailedException on network errors
SnapshotController > create > should delegate to service.create with the provided DTO
SnapshotController > create > should pass optional temporal and outputs fields from DTO to service
SnapshotController > list > should delegate to service.list with the provided query DTO
SnapshotController > list > should handle query with algorithmPreset filter
SnapshotController > list > should handle query with key and version filters
SnapshotController > list > should handle query with populate option
SnapshotController > list > should handle empty query parameters
SnapshotController > getById > should delegate to service.getById with the provided id
SnapshotController > deleteById > should delegate to service.deleteById with the provided id
SnapshotRepository > create > should call model.create with the provided data
SnapshotRepository > create > should handle optional temporal and outputs fields
SnapshotRepository > create > should handle create errors
SnapshotRepository > findAll > should call model.paginate with filter and options
SnapshotRepository > findAll > should handle empty filter and default pagination options
SnapshotRepository > findAll > should handle populate option
SnapshotRepository > findById > should call model.findById with id and return lean result
SnapshotRepository > findById > should return null when snapshot not found
SnapshotRepository > deleteById > should call model.findByIdAndDelete with id and session option
SnapshotRepository > deleteById > should pass session when provided
SnapshotRepository > deleteById > should return null when snapshot not found
SnapshotService > create > should create snapshot with frozen algorithmPreset when preset exists
SnapshotService > create > should throw NotFoundException when algorithmPreset does not exist
SnapshotService > create > should pass optional temporal and outputs fields with frozen preset
SnapshotService > list > should filter by status from queryDto
SnapshotService > list > should filter by algorithmPreset from queryDto
SnapshotService > list > should filter by key directly on frozen field
SnapshotService > list > should filter by version directly on frozen field
SnapshotService > list > should filter by both key and version directly on frozen fields
SnapshotService > list > should filter by algorithmPreset combined with status
SnapshotService > list > should handle empty query parameters without filters
SnapshotService > list > should handle populate option
SnapshotService > list > should handle sortBy passthrough when provided
SnapshotService > list > should query directly for non-existent key on frozen field
SnapshotService > getById > should return snapshot when found
SnapshotService > getById > should throw NotFoundException when snapshot not found
SnapshotService > deleteById > should complete successfully when snapshot is deleted
SnapshotService > deleteById > should throw NotFoundException when snapshot not found
SnapshotService > deleteById > should terminate workflow and clean S3 when snapshot is running
SnapshotService > deleteById > should handle S3 cleanup failures gracefully
SnapshotService > deleteById > should handle partial S3 deletion failures
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should be an array of SQL statements
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create all required tables
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create rounds table with correct structure
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create pools table with correct structure
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create proposals table with correct structure
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create users table with correct structure
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create milestones table with autoincrement id
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create reviews table with autoincrement review_id
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create comments table with correct structure
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create comment_votes table with composite primary key
Database Bootstrap > BOOTSTRAP_SQL > should create indexes
Database Bootstrap > SCHEMA_VERSION > should be defined
Database Client > createDb > should create database instance
Database Client > createDb > should initialize database with schema
Database Client > createDb > should return independent instances
Database Client > closeDbInstance > should close database connection
DeepFunding Client > createDeepFundingClient > should create client with default config
DeepFunding Client > createDeepFundingClient > should create client with custom config
DeepFunding Client > createDeepFundingClient > should merge partial retry config with defaults
DeepFunding Client > createDeepFundingClient > should have get method
DeepFunding Client > createDeepFundingClient > should have limiter
API Endpoints > endpoints > should return correct path for rounds
API Endpoints > endpoints > should return correct path for pools
API Endpoints > endpoints > should return correct path for proposals with roundId
API Endpoints > endpoints > should return correct path for users
API Endpoints > endpoints > should return correct path for milestones
API Endpoints > endpoints > should return correct path for reviews
API Endpoints > endpoints > should return correct path for comments
API Endpoints > endpoints > should return correct path for comment votes
HTTP Utils > createLimiter > should create a limiter with specified concurrency
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return true for network timeout errors
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return true for connection reset errors
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return true for connection refused errors
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return true for socket hang up errors
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return true for network errors
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return true for 429 status code
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return true for 5xx status codes
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return false for 4xx errors (except 429)
HTTP Utils > isRetryableError > should return false for non-HTTP errors without network keywords
HTTP Utils > isNonRetryableError > should return true for 4xx errors (except 429)
HTTP Utils > isNonRetryableError > should return false for 429
HTTP Utils > isNonRetryableError > should return false for 5xx errors
HTTP Utils > isNonRetryableError > should return false for non-HTTP errors
HTTP Utils > calculateDelay > should calculate exponential backoff
HTTP Utils > calculateDelay > should cap delay at maxDelayMs
HTTP Utils > calculateDelay > should include jitter
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should execute successful request
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should handle URL with trailing slash in baseUrl
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should handle path without leading slash
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should include query parameters
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should include authentication header
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should throw HttpError for 4xx responses
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should retry on retryable errors
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should not retry on non-retryable errors
HTTP Utils > executeRequest > should respect maxAttempts
Paginate Utils > fetchAllPages > should collect all pages from paginated fetcher
Paginate Utils > fetchAllPages > should handle empty results
Paginate Utils > fetchAllPages > should handle single page results
Paginate Utils > fetchAllPages > should handle objects in pages
HttpError > should create error with status code and message
HttpError > should include body when provided
HttpError > should handle different status codes
HttpError > should format error message correctly
HttpError > should be throwable
Shared Utils > chunkArray > should split array into chunks of specified size
Shared Utils > chunkArray > should handle empty array
Shared Utils > chunkArray > should handle array smaller than chunk size
Shared Utils > chunkArray > should handle exact chunk size
Shared Utils > chunkArray > should handle single element array
Shared Utils > chunkArray > should handle chunk size of 1
Shared Utils > chunkArray > should preserve array element types
Shared Utils > chunkArray > should handle objects in array
Shared Utils > DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE > should be defined
Shared Utils > DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE > should be a positive number

CommentVote Normalization > normalizeCommentVoteToRecord > should transform API response to DB record format
CommentVote Normalization > normalizeCommentVoteToRecord > should handle null created_at

CommentVote Repository > createMany > should insert multiple comment votes
CommentVote Repository > findAll > should return all comment votes
CommentVote Repository > findByCommentId > should find votes by comment ID

Comment Repository > createMany > should insert multiple comments
Comment Repository > findAll > should return all comments
Comment Repository > findByProposalId > should find comments by proposal ID
Comment Repository > findByUserId > should find comments by user ID
Comment Repository > findById > should find comment by ID

Proposal API > fetchProposals > should include poolId in params when provided
Proposal API > fetchProposals > should return empty array when no proposals

Proposal Normalization > normalizeProposalToRecord > should handle null updated_at
Proposal Normalization > normalizeProposalToRecord > should handle empty team_members array

Proposal Repository > createMany > should insert multiple proposals

Proposal Repository > findAll > should return all proposals
Proposal Repository > findAll > should return empty array when no proposals exist
Proposal Repository > findByRoundId > should find proposals by round ID
Proposal Repository > findByRoundId > should return empty array when no proposals found for round
Proposal Repository > findById > should find proposal by ID
Proposal Repository > findById > should return undefined when proposal not found

Review Normalization > normalizeReviewToRecord > should handle null created_at

Round Repository > findAll > should return all rounds

Milestone Normalization > normalizeMilestoneToRecord > should handle all milestone statuses
Milestone Normalization > normalizeMilestoneToRecord > should serialize raw JSON correctly
Milestone Repository > create > should insert a single milestone
Milestone Repository > createMany > should insert multiple milestones
Milestone Repository > createMany > should handle chunking for large batches
Milestone Repository > createMany > should use default chunk size when not specified

Milestone Repository > findAll > should return empty array when no milestones exist

Milestone Repository > findByProposalId > should return empty array when no milestones found for proposal

Milestone Repository > findById > should return undefined when milestone not found
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionKeys > should return all algorithm keys sorted alphabetically (ASCII)
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionKeys > should include all algorithms from the registry
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionKeys > should maintain alphabetical sorting even with different key formats
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should return all latest definitions when called without filters
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should return all latest definitions when called with empty filters object
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should search by key with exact case-insensitive match
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should search by key with partial substring match
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should search by name with exact case-insensitive match
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should search by name with partial substring match
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should search by category with exact case-insensitive match
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should search by category with partial substring match
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should use OR logic across filters
API: searchAlgorithmDefinitions > should return empty array when no algorithms match
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionVersions > should return versions for algorithms with multiple versions
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionVersions > should return versions for algorithms with single version
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionVersions > should return versions sorted by SemVer ascending
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionVersions > should handle algorithms with 0.x.x pre-release versions
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionVersions > should throw NotFoundError with KEY_NOT_FOUND for unknown key
API: getAlgorithmDefinitionVersions > should handle algorithms with major version jumps
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > valid requests > should return definition for valid key and version
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > valid requests > should return specific version when requested
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > valid requests > should return latest version when version is "latest"
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > valid requests > should return latest version when version is not specified
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > valid requests > should handle single-version algorithms
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > valid requests > should return different definitions for different versions
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > structure validation > should have valid inputs array structure
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > structure validation > should have valid outputs array structure with at least one output
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > structure validation > should handle algorithms with multiple outputs
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > structure validation > should validate inputs evolve across versions
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > structure validation > should ensure all algorithms have required metadata
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > error handling > should throw NotFoundError for unknown key
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > error handling > should throw NotFoundError for unknown version
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > error handling > should throw NotFoundError for versions that do not exist
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > error handling > should throw NotFoundError when requesting an unsupported version
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > immutability > should return JSON string representation
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > version evolution > should show progression of features across versions
API: getAlgorithmDefinition > version evolution > should handle major version changes correctly
CLI: buildRegistry > should build registry for empty directory
CLI: buildRegistry > should build registry with algorithms
CLI: buildRegistry > should skip writing when content is unchanged
CLI: buildRegistry > should update existing registry when content changes
CLI: buildRegistry > should handle multiple algorithms and versions
CLI: buildRegistry > should handle error during scanning
CLI: buildRegistry > should create output directory if it does not exist
CLI: buildRegistry > should handle includeMetadata option
CLI: createAlgorithm > valid inputs > should create algorithm with valid key and version
CLI: createAlgorithm > valid inputs > should create algorithm with custom config
CLI: createAlgorithm > valid inputs > should create algorithm with prerelease version
CLI: createAlgorithm > valid inputs > should create nested directory structure
CLI: createAlgorithm > valid inputs > should overwrite existing file when overwrite is true
CLI: createAlgorithm > valid inputs > should include proper JSON formatting
CLI: createAlgorithm > validation errors > should reject invalid key format
CLI: createAlgorithm > validation errors > should reject invalid version format
CLI: createAlgorithm > validation errors > should show validation examples on error
CLI: createAlgorithm > validation errors > should reject when file already exists and overwrite is false
CLI: createAlgorithm > validation errors > should reject when file already exists and overwrite is not specified
CLI: createAlgorithm > output messages > should display helpful next steps
CLI: createAlgorithm > output messages > should display file path
CLI: createAlgorithm > edge cases > should handle algorithm keys with numbers
CLI: createAlgorithm > edge cases > should handle complex semantic versions
CLI: createAlgorithm > edge cases > should handle minimal config
CLI: validateRegistry > scanRegistryFiles > should scan empty registry
CLI: validateRegistry > scanRegistryFiles > should scan registry with valid algorithms
CLI: validateRegistry > scanRegistryFiles > should scan multiple algorithms and versions
CLI: validateRegistry > validateEntry > should validate correct entry
CLI: validateRegistry > validateEntry > should throw ValidationError for invalid schema
CLI: validateRegistry > validateEntry > should throw KeyMismatchError for folder/content key mismatch
CLI: validateRegistry > validateEntry > should throw VersionMismatchError for filename/content version mismatch
CLI: validateRegistry > validateEntry > should throw ValidationError for non-object content
CLI: validateRegistry > validateEntry > should throw ValidationError for null content
CLI: validateRegistry > checkDuplicates > should pass for unique entries
CLI: validateRegistry > checkDuplicates > should throw DuplicateError for duplicate key@version
CLI: validateRegistry > checkDuplicates > should skip entries with invalid content
CLI: validateRegistry > checkDuplicates > should skip entries with missing key or version
CLI: validateRegistry > validateRegistry > should validate empty registry
